description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image with mysql, redis, and postgres services and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define the default test stage and add a test_async job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/async.spec.js. Also add a test_db job that runs npm install then node ./specs/start.js ./specs/db-postgres.spec.js. Both jobs run in the test stage, have no artifacts, caches, or rules, and inherit the shared cache configuration.
